name: Freezer Bread Dough- Master Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine 2 1/2 cups flour and yeast.
2. In a saucepan, heat milk, margarine, sugar, and salt just until warm (115 to 120 degrees), stirring constantly until margarine almost melts.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients in the mixing bowl along with eggs. Beat at low speed for 1/2 minute, scraping sides of the bowl constantly.
4. Beat for 3 minutes at high speed.
5. Stir in enough flour to make a stiff dough that is smooth and elastic (6 to 8 minutes total).
6. Divide the dough into thirds. Shape each of two portions into loaves.
7. Store the shaped loaves in a freezer container with a double thickness of waxed paper between.
8. Divide the remaining dough into 16 balls and arrange them 1 inch apart in a freezer container.
